content.body: Hm. https://html.spec.whatwg.org/#referrer-policy-attributes refers to "the empty string state", but there's no link, and no other use of that term in the spec.
Seems like there should be a link to https://w3c.github.io/webappsec-referrer-policy/#referrer-policy-empty-string, at least from "terms ... defined in `Referrer Policy`"
content.formatted_body: Seems like there should be a link to https://w3c.github.io/webappsec-referrer-policy/#referrer-policy-empty-string, at least from "terms ... defined in Referrer Policy"
